it was a creepy pasta

Was awesome until lately where there is this block of Korean text stuck on the screen which is in your direct line of sight and you can't move it. I tried switching languages and it just won't go away. Please fix this otherwise great and inventive way of story telling.

reviews.review_title: Oh my God this app is beautiful
reviews.review_description: The stories are incredibly immersive and the supernatural girl was my personal favorite, please add more comics
I was enjoying the app until something happened and then app stopped working. I can’t even get into the stories anymore
I like this! If you like comics it's good, hardly takes up any space. Very cool for free

The good news is that all comics in this app are available for free. The bad news is that what you see is what you get. Don’t expect this app to get any more comics then it already has cause the developers have seemingly abandoned it. Which is quite a shame as the concept of VR comics is pretty neat. But sadly it wasn’t meant to be.
Been playing it last 2 years.. as I bought another VR Oculus 2, this Sphere Toon VR comic won't work. It always appears to check my connection.
Just need more storys in english. But it's really cool!
Hey can you do some more in English please or are you are you even messing with this game anymore or what's going on
Do comics English pls
Everything would be fine if everything was in English and so the graphics are great, but it would be better if everything was in English…
I hate it

Hi, I really enjoyed this app but I would like to know when is it going to be updated. I have just seen a few comics in English since almost 2 years ago. Do you have plans to upload more material to the app?
I would expect this to be like Webtoons but in VR, and users be able to upload their comics too. That would be great.
By the moment, with just 4-5 comics in english, I cannot give 5 stars.
Just add more material and I will update my review. 
Thanks!!

reviews.review_title: Scared the living F@$“? out of me
reviews.review_description: I was watching this horror comic and I thought: I’m not scared, I’m a M A N. So I flipped to the next page of a raggedy person with the background red, flip to the next slide and the face of the Z O M B I E  SHOWED AND IT HAD A SCREAM FOLLOWING!!! I was so scared, I quitted the app, and removed it from my library. Never put my cursor over it since...
It’s so amazing but the fact there is so little comics in English.Anyhow very creepy comics I jumped out of my seat for the story ghost.The animations are so scary I stayed up till around 3:00 am
We need more comics in English it’s like this app is made for Koreans
It sucks

I love it. The stories are great. The graphics are pretty cool and engaging. I just wish that there were more stories in English.

Update review still love this app just wish they would add more stories.

I has great potential, but not enough selections. 

PS. If they create Solo Leveling in VR even if its $100 I will buy it!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Needs more content and hand tracking
reviews.review_description: The "comic books" in english are around 8 and they are more like short stories not full novels. Also providing a control scheme using only head tracking or hand tracking wouldn't hurt.
Lots of new content compared to a few years back when it launched on Gear VR. Unfortunately no English translations for the new releases.
I haven’t played it lmao

I love it so much. It’s the best game on VR, unfortunately there is only a 
few stores in English
This app is really cool they have a few comics that you can read but they are short
Good scary but it’s to short it needs more comics and longer stories
Only has a handful of titles all very short and very poorly written. Good visuals but again not worth it

it’s not fun at all are you listen to his notes there’s really nothing to do☹️
￼

The current library is slim at best, however what is available is extremely well made and enjoyable. I would pay for this on a subscription basis if I was able to have a constant stream of new content in English. This app is very impressive and my only complaint is that there isn’t enough of it

I really enjoyed the content available and think the concept is sound, but I just wish there was more English content. I realize it is a new app to the Quest so I will give it some time to see if they add more English content in the future. I also wish that there was a way to delete content you already read but was unable to find that option currently. Lastly, it would be nice to see slightly longer stories even if they were paid content.

I love the comics, but my only complaint is there needs to be more and longer stories, and hopefully some like the supernatural girl, I wanna see some romance stories but that's not a big deal. Other than that the stories available in English are very well made and I truly wish to see more

reviews.review_title: Positive and hopeful VR comic experience
reviews.review_description: Sphere Toon is a fun experience and I am anticipating what future comics and features will be available.

I could sau that it wasted of $$. I checked last time and there are nothing new comic books to come.

wondering when will release new books?

I loved how immersive the stories are. They have great content. I wish there was more English stories and/or that you could spend money to buy more books. 

There is a lot of horror stories and while that is something I enjoy myself I don’t recommend this for younger kids. I do hope that they come out with more English stories and make them a little bit longer. I think this was a good idea for a game in theory, but in reality, the developers just didn’t come through with this idea.
Needs a bigger collection of Webnovels or any novel really to be put in vr or a button that allows you to sync your novels from your phone or ereader
I really like the immersion and screamer in vr. It delivers good chills. I hope Vr comics will develop more in future.

reviews.review_title: Few selections now, but novel concept
reviews.review_description:
Was winding down from another game and tried "Sample" out, and while I saw the end coming, I was pleasantly surprised by the layout.

For those getting into it the first time, you'll probably want to be seated if you don't want to be standing through the floor. Low couch and table and all.

Took a star off as I finished Sample and couldn't find a way to remove it, and viewing it on the Quest I may run into a point where I need space for other novels/games, so being able to remove it would be a great addition rather than deleting the entire app and reloading it. 

Also, not sure if you could add a happy green checkmark to the corner of completed novels in the future. I'm looking forward to checking out the rest of the (English) novels.
I absolutely love this app. I just finished the Supernatural Girl, and I'm about to cry. The horror was scary and fun, and everything about this app is just incredible.
I love it so much ecpical the jump scares
